name: Cerrado Gold Inc.
summary: Cerrado Gold Inc. operates as a gold mining and exploration company in South America. It primarily explores for gold and silver deposits. The company owns a 100% interest in the Minera Don Nicolas project covering an area of approximately 333,400 hectares located in Santa Cruz province, Argentina; and Monte Do Carmo gold project covering an area of approximately 58,000 hectares located in Tocantins, Brazil. Cerrado Gold Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
